description: Living opportunity feed. Don and agents add ideas anytime. Reviewed daily by ZigBot. Best ideas flow into Helix → Vector pipeline.

item.title: string (short description)
item.category: string (revenue | product | distribution | operations | security | wild_idea)
item.status: new | reviewing | scored | approved | rejected | merged | mission_created
item.score: number (1-10, assigned by ZigBot during review)
item.route_to: string (helix | vector | prism | forge | pulse | none)
